entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Referenced as a source for weight logging ('manually logged in Fitbit or scales')

entities.name: Health Tracking Database
entities.context: SQLite schema defining tables for workouts, check-ins, resting HR, weight, and sleep

entities.name: Daily Check-ins Framework
entities.context: Qualitative daily self-assessment: wanted to work out, worked out, regretted workout — a motivation/regret tracking model

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Tracking
entities.context: Daily vitals: resting HR, HRV, SpO2, skin temp delta from wearable sources

entities.name: Weight Tracking
entities.context: Daily weight in kg with BMI and body fat percentage

entities.name: Workout Metrics
entities.context: Per-workout data: duration, distance, calories, avg HR, linked to parent workout records

relationships.context: Fitbit is one source for daily weight and likely resting HR / sleep data
Database includes daily_checkins table implementing the motivation/regret model
daily_resting_hr table stores HR, HRV, SpO2, skin temp delta
daily_weight table stores weight, BMI, body fat pct
workout_metrics table with FK to workouts, storing per-session performance data
Check-ins capture subjective motivation/regret; metrics capture objective performance — complementary views of the same training days
